creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #4)

Actally you did AFAICT change the checksum https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=245677&action=diff#b/www/librewolf/distinfo_sec1
so please change it to correct one which is the old one sha526 ff6e224ed0eb3c9d4c3ae92acd9cd04d750e0bcc6be1fa64ccc1317abcc13711

Thanks
